title: Muscarella obliquipetala
taxonomy: Muscarella obliquipetala is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Muscarella, which is a group of orchids that are native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The species Muscarella obliquipetala is further classified as belonging to the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, which is a subcategory of the orchid family. The exact classification of Muscarella obliquipetala may also involve its order and class, which would be Asparagales and flowering plant respectively. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of this species.
